stat_block.text:
Magical enhancements make this weapon strike true. Attack rolls with this weapon gain a +1 item bonus, and the weapon can be etched with one property rune.  
 You can upgrade the *weapon potency* rune already etched on a weapon to a stronger version, increasing the values of the existing rune to those of the new rune. The Price of the upgrade is the difference between the two runes' prices.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

variants.craft_requirements: You are an expert in Crafting.
variants.name: Weapon Potency (+1)

variants.craft_requirements: You are a master in Crafting.
variants.name: Weapon Potency (+2)
variants.text: The item bonus to attack rolls is +2, and the weapon can be etched with two property runes.

variants.name: Weapon Potency (+3)
variants.text: The item bonus to attack rolls is +3, and the weapon can be etched with three property runes.
